items.title: Xbox cuts Game Pass prices but new Call of Duty games will no longer hit the service on day one
items.summary: Xbox is cutting the prices of both Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass, effective immediately, but there’s one big caveat. First, the good news: Game Pass Ultimate now costs $23...

items.title: Meta Is Sued Over Scam Ads on Facebook and Instagram
items.summary: A lawsuit from the Consumer Federation of America accuses Meta of misleading consumers about its efforts to combat scams advertisements on its platforms.
